items.evidence_span: Neural network sparsity [1] attempts to reduce the executed number of parameters and thus improve performance.
Many methods, such as gradual magnitude pruning [2],
Wanda [3],
SparseGPT [4],
Existing techniques, including DejaVu [5],
MoEification [6],
Scaling Transformers[^0][7],
as in GPT models [8]
as in Llama [9].
We use the Pythia [13] series of pre-trained LLMs
We further evaluate Sparse Expansion across the entire Llama 2 family [16]
We use the Wikitext-2 dataset [17] as calibration data
We rely upon the RAPIDS library [18] to accelerate the fitting and running of the PCA and K-means models
